name: Aetheria
description:
A vast, otherworldly landscape at night.

Floating islands, covered in lush, dark green vegetation, are suspended in the air against a backdrop of a deep purple and violet night sky. Many stars are visible. A faint aurora or similar atmospheric phenomenon is present.

The islands appear to be situated amongst misty, low-lying clouds, and other small islands or land masses are visible at the lower portion of the image. The overall color palette is a mix of deep blues, purples, and greens, with glowing, bioluminescent details visible in the foreground vegetation. A small figure is positioned in the bottom right corner of the image, looking up at the floating islands above.
creator: abbey
